# AI Agent Progress Message Catalog

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/progressmessage verify -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

> Riido task: RIID-4964

Executable SSOT: [`progressmessage/catalog.dsl.riido.json`](../../progressmessage/catalog.dsl.riido.json).

AI Agent runtime progress messages are fixed, translated, integer-coded, append-only, and rendered before public SSE delivery.

- Status: `verified_with_capacity`
- Evidence artifact: `progress-message-catalog-evidence`
- Contract: `ai-agent-progress-message-catalog.v1`
- Messages: `11/15`
- Required/active/reserved: `3/5/3`

## Rules

- Message codes are integer, stable, and append-only.
- A code must never be removed or reassigned. If product copy is no longer used, keep the code and mark usage as `reserved`.
- The active catalog is intentionally small. `max_messages=15` prevents the SSE surface from becoming an unbounded prompt-generated copy channel.
- `usage=required` messages are system-critical and must remain supported by daemon/control-plane fallbacks.
- `usage=active` messages may be emitted by current daemon runtime parsing.
- `usage=reserved` messages are not part of active daemon emission yet, but are held for compatibility or future product copy.
- Public frontend SSE shape does not change. Generated/internal code may carry `message_code` and `message_args`, but public UI still consumes rendered `message`.
- Tool message `label` arguments are state-neutral nouns or noun phrases. They must not include rendered state suffixes such as `수집 중`, `조회 완료`, `실행 중`, `실행`, or `완료`.
- Daemon and control-plane renderers defensively normalize `label` before rendering so persisted/provider telemetry does not duplicate public state copy.

## Projection

```text
progressmessage/catalog.dsl.riido.json
  -> progressmessage/catalog.ir.riido.json
  -> daemon structured telemetry parser
  -> control-plane progress renderer
  -> existing SSE message string
```

Provider prompts should prefer:

```text
<riido_log>{"code":1101,"args":{"label":"팀 프로젝트","description":"팀의 프로젝트 목록, 진행 상태, 우선순위와 담당자 정보를 조회해 요약을 준비 중. . ." }}<end>
```

## Message Catalog

| Code | Key | Usage | Category | Args | Korean copy |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `1001` | `agent.thinking` | `required` | `agent` | - | 생각 중. . . |
| `1002` | `assignment.queued.agent_busy` | `required` | `assignment` | - | 지금은 다른 작업을 처리 중이에요. 현재 작업이 끝나는 대로 바로 시작할게요. |
| `1003` | `assignment.stopped.agent_deleted` | `required` | `assignment` | - | 에이전트가 삭제되어 진행 중이던 작업이 중지됐어요. |
| `1004` | `assignment.stopped.by_user` | `active` | `assignment` | actor_name:string | {{actor_name}}님이 직접 종료하였습니다 |
| `1101` | `tool.collecting` | `active` | `tool` | label:string, description:string | {{label}} 수집 중 - {{description}} |
| `1102` | `tool.collection_completed_count` | `active` | `tool` | label:string, count:int, representative_title:string | {{label}} 조회 완료 - {{count}}건({{representative_title}} 외)의 요약을 가져왔습니다. . . |
| `1103` | `tool.running` | `active` | `tool` | label:string, description:string | {{label}} 실행 중 - {{description}} |
| `1104` | `tool.completed` | `active` | `tool` | label:string, summary:string | {{label}} 완료 - {{summary}} |
| `1201` | `assignment.started` | `reserved` | `assignment` | - | 작업을 시작했어요. |
| `1202` | `assignment.completed` | `reserved` | `assignment` | - | 작업을 완료했어요. |
| `1203` | `assignment.failed` | `reserved` | `assignment` | - | 작업을 계속 진행하지 못했어요. |

## Evidence Loop

| Step | Evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Observe | Progress message copy already had DSL, IR, and runtime code, but the reader document was hand-maintained prose without a strict evidence artifact. |
| Hypothesis | Generating the reader and evidence from the catalog manifest plus DSL/IR will remove interpretation drift between daemon, control-plane, and client-facing SSE behavior. |
| Execute | Verify DSL to IR drift, render the catalog reader, validate workflow evidence binding, and upload a JSON evidence artifact in public CI. |
| Evaluate | The verifier fails on stale IR, stale generated reader, missing workflow binding, malformed manifest, or missing strict artifact upload. |
| Retrospective | Progress copy governance becomes an executable loop: fixed integer code catalog in SSOT, generated reader for humans, and evidence artifact for agents. |
